====Pokémon==== Jessie uses a team of three {{OBP|Shadow Pokémon|GO}} in a {{OBP|Trainer Battle|GO}}. {{highlight|Green-colored cells|{{green color light}}}} denote the Pokémon that may be encountered during the bonus challenge.
